name: Epicureanism
tagline: The good life is tranquil pleasure, modest and shared.
summary: Often caricatured as hedonism, Epicureanism is in fact a careful art of contentment: avoid pain, cultivate friendship, take simple pleasures, and free yourself from the fear of gods and death. The goal is ataraxia — untroubled calm.

quotes.text: Not what we have, but what we enjoy, is our abundance.
quotes.author: Epicurus

quotes.text: The wealth required by nature is easy to procure.
quotes.author: Epicurus

quotes.text: He who is not satisfied with a little is satisfied with nothing.
quotes.author: Epicurus
